title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Indore. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Indore. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: ME/M.Tech or equivalent in relevant area of specialization, BE/B.Tech Degree in relevant branch of engineering from a recognized university/institution with at least one year of experience (after completion of BE/BTech)
qualification.details: ME/M.Tech or equivalent in relevant area of specialization OR BE/B.Tech Degree in relevant branch of engineering from a recognized university/institution with at least one year of experience (after completion of BE/BTech).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Indore is 30th May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow position announced by IIT Indore in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an ME/M.Tech or equivalent in a relevant specialization, or a BE/B.Tech degree with at least one year of experience after completion.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Indore is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Indore located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Indore is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 453552.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIT Indore or the direct application link provided before the last date, 30th May 2026.
